    • Module contents

Submodules

pyacs.debug module

pyacs.debug.debug()[source]
Returns:

True if verbose mode is debug, returns False otherwise

pyacs.verbose module

pyacs.verbose.verbose(level='INFO', print_message=True, log_dir=None)[source]

Set pyacs verbose level and optionally configure file logging.

Parameters:

  • level (str, optional) – Verbose level: ‘DEBUG’, ‘INFO’, ‘VERBOSE’, ‘WARNING’, ‘ERROR’, or ‘SILENT’. Default ‘INFO’.

  • print_message (bool, optional) – If True, print a message when the level changes. Default True.

  • log_dir (str, optional) – Directory for log files. If None, file logging is not configured.

Return type:

None

Module contents
